mapper.select: SELECT C.CART_NO, C.MEMBER_NO, C.GOODS_NO, C.GOODS_OPTION_NO, C.QTY, C.CART_ADD_DATE, G.GOODS_NAME, G.GOODS_PRICE AS UNIT_PRICE, G.DELIVERY_COST, (GI.GOODS_IMG_PATH || GI.GOODS_IMG_RE) AS THUMBNAIL, GO.GOODS_SIZE, GO.GOODS_COLOR, GO.STOCK FROM CART C JOIN GOODS G ON C.GOODS_NO = G.GOODS_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_OPTION GO ON C.GOODS_OPTION_NO = GO.GOODS_OPTION_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_IMG GI ON G.GOODS_NO = GI.GOODS_NO AND GI.GOODS_IMG_ORDER = 0 WHERE C.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND G.GOODS_DEL_FL = 'N' ORDER BY C.CART_ADD_DATE DESC

SELECT C.CART_NO, C.MEMBER_NO, C.GOODS_NO, C.GOODS_OPTION_NO, C.QTY, C.CART_ADD_DATE, G.GOODS_NAME, G.GOODS_PRICE AS UNIT_PRICE, G.DELIVERY_COST, (GI.GOODS_IMG_PATH || GI.GOODS_IMG_RE) AS THUMBNAIL, GO.GOODS_SIZE, GO.GOODS_COLOR, GO.STOCK FROM CART C JOIN GOODS G ON C.GOODS_NO = G.GOODS_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_OPTION GO ON C.GOODS_OPTION_NO = GO.GOODS_OPTION_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_IMG GI ON G.GOODS_NO = GI.GOODS_NO AND GI.GOODS_IMG_ORDER = 0 WHERE C.CART_NO = #{cartNo}

SELECT C.CART_NO, C.MEMBER_NO, C.GOODS_NO, C.GOODS_OPTION_NO, C.QTY, C.CART_ADD_DATE, G.GOODS_NAME, G.GOODS_PRICE AS UNIT_PRICE, G.DELIVERY_COST, (GI.GOODS_IMG_PATH || GI.GOODS_IMG_RE) AS THUMBNAIL, GO.GOODS_SIZE, GO.GOODS_COLOR, GO.STOCK FROM CART C JOIN GOODS G ON C.GOODS_NO = G.GOODS_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_OPTION GO ON C.GOODS_OPTION_NO = GO.GOODS_OPTION_NO LEFT JOIN GOODS_IMG GI ON G.GOODS_NO = GI.GOODS_NO AND GI.GOODS_IMG_ORDER = 0 WHERE C.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND C.GOODS_NO = #{goodsNo} AND ( (C.GOODS_OPTION_NO = #{goodsOptionNo}) OR (C.GOODS_OPTION_NO IS NULL AND #{goodsOptionNo} IS NULL) )
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CART.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CART ( CART_NO, MEMBER_NO, GOODS_NO, GOODS_OPTION_NO, QTY, CART_ADD_DATE ) VALUES ( #{cartNo}, #{memberNo}, #{goodsNo}, #{goodsOptionNo}, #{qty}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN G.GOODS_NO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 999999 END AS STOCK FROM GOODS G WHERE G.GOODS_NO = #{goodsNo} AND G.GOODS_DEL_FL = 'N'
